_doc: parallax tiers config — customize classification for your domain. Overrides inline defaults. All fields optional — missing fields fall back to the daemon's built-in defaults.
_self_name_doc: this consumer's repo id; used by addressed_to_us to detect a doc that responds to us (a parent_artifacts entry citing this string).
_addressed_doc: artifact_types that are T1 unconditionally (a cross-team ask demanding a response).
_addressed_to_us_doc: artifact_types that are T1 ONLY when a parent cites self_name (a reaction ABOUT us is must-read; one about something else falls through to optional). Cuts T1 noise.
